title: PolicySet
description: A named collection of Cedar policies that governs authorization decisions within the MIP platform. PolicySets are referenced by ApplicationTemplate (approval_rules), TrustProfile (issuer trust), ComplianceProfile (verification rules), and the API gateway (access control). Each PolicySet contains one or more Cedar policy statements evaluated using deny-by-default semantics: at least one permit must match and zero forbid policies may match for the request to be authorized.

policy_type.description: ACCESS_CONTROL: API authorization (principal → action → resource). CREDENTIAL_VERIFICATION: trust evaluation during credential presentation. APPROVAL_RULES: application auto-approval / denial logic. CUSTOM: organization-defined policy domain.

policy_id.description: Unique identifier for this policy within the set. Used as the @id annotation in the Cedar text.

effect.description: The Cedar effect of this policy. Must match the effect keyword in cedar_text.

cedar_text.description: The full Cedar policy statement including scope, conditions, and annotations. Must be valid Cedar syntax that validates against the MIP Cedar schema (cedar/mip.cedarschema).

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this policy does.

enabled.description: Disabled policies are excluded from evaluation.

cedar_schema_version.description: Version of the MIP Cedar schema these policies validate against.

status.description: DRAFT: not yet enforced. ACTIVE: evaluated on every matching request. ARCHIVED: retained for audit but not evaluated.
